title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 87.475 - Honorary members, admission of
text:
87.475.  Honorary members, admission of. — The board of trustees may provide for the admission of honorary members of the department in such manner and under such conditions as may be set forth in the rules and regulations enacted by said board of trustees.
(RSMo 1939 § 9521) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8954; 1919 § 9055; 1909 § 9880
